name: officedev-microsoft-teams-samples-bot-meetings-nodejs
title: Bot Meetings - Meeting Events and Transcription
shortDescription: This Node.js sample demonstrates how a bot can receive real-time meeting events and retrieve meeting transcripts within Microsoft Teams.
longDescription: This sample showcases the capabilities of a bot in Microsoft Teams to capture real-time meeting events such as meeting start, meeting end, participant join, and participant leave. It also retrieves meeting transcripts via the Microsoft Graph API and displays them in a task module. Built using the Teams AI SDK.

thumbnails.alt: Solution UX showing meeting events and transcription

references.name: Teams development videos from the community
